steps.title: Identify the contrasting observations
steps.content: The passage moves from describing how Ali's poem shows “fluid interplay of poetry and painting” to asserting that it “highlights fundamental tensions between these modes of representation.” The transition must bridge these two observations.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
At the same time works because it indicates that the poem reveals two different aspects simultaneously—both the harmonious interaction and the fundamental conflicts between the forms.

The other choices misrepresent the relationship: Therefore incorrectly suggests the tensions logically follow from the interplay, Specifically wrongly suggests tensions are a supporting detail, and In other words falsely implies they are equivalent restatements.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
